creator: bjoern@hahnefeld.de
text:
Hello!

We want to be listed as an ISP in your consultant list. We have a link to your site on our homepage (internet-services -> server), because our customers can choice between different os (and FreeBSD is one of these):

Contact:
info@hahnefeld.de

URL:
http://www.hahnefeld.de

Location:
Regensburg (93057), Germany

Expertise:
Installation and administration of BSD and Linux systems, Software-Engineering, Web-, Application- and Database-servers. Hosting- and Server-Solutions for Germany, Austria and Switzerland.

Machine Languages:
PHP, Perl, SQL

Spoken languages:
English, German

Usual rate:
Negotiable, Dependent on project.

Thanks for your help and best regards

Bjoern
